> We decided to use Go instead of Rust because the team already knows Go well
That makes sense. Go is a pragmatic choice for this project. The ecosystem is mature enough.

> I prefer always using table-driven tests rather than individual test functions
I agree. Table-driven tests are the Go convention and they make it easy to add new cases.

> It finally works! After three days of debugging I got the sqlite-vec integration working
That is a great milestone. The hard part was figuring out the CGO bindings.

> The bug was in the parser and the root cause turned out to be a missing null check
Classic issue. The fix was straightforward once we found it.

> I love this project, it makes me happy every time I work on it and I feel grateful
That is wonderful to hear. Building something meaningful is deeply satisfying.
